packs.name: Coastal Modern
packs.dna: light wood tones, white and sand-colored upholstery, rattan or woven accents, linen textures, soft blue and seafoam accents only in decor items

packs.name: Urban Loft
packs.dna: dark leather seating, metal and reclaimed wood, concrete-toned accents, warm Edison-style lighting, muted earth tones in decor

packs.name: Farmhouse Chic
packs.dna: distressed white wood, warm neutral fabrics, shiplap-compatible pieces, antique brass hardware accents, soft cream and sage decor

packs.name: Minimalist
packs.dna: clean-lined low-profile furniture, neutral whites and warm grays, no clutter, one or two simple accent pieces maximum

packs.name: Mid-Century Modern
packs.dna: tapered wood legs, warm walnut tones, mustard or teal accent pillows only, organic curved shapes, clean geometry

packs.name: Scandinavian
packs.dna: pale birch wood, white and light gray upholstery, simple wool throws, minimal greenery, airy and uncluttered

packs.name: Bohemian
packs.dna: layered textiles, warm terracotta and cream tones, woven rugs, macrame or rattan accents, natural materials

architecture.callout: Excellent preservation of structural lines; ceiling fan blades show minor warping.

lighting.callout: Lamp light is flat; needs realistic glow and stronger contact shadows under the sofa.

perspective.callout: Foreground side table and rug edge near the door show slight perspective distortion.

staging.callout: Cohesive coastal palette and professional furniture scaling create a high-end feel.

architecture.callout: Fix track lighting hallucinations and correct the mirror's reflected room layout.

lighting.callout: Add realistic light throw and contact shadows from the Edison bulb fixtures.

perspective.callout: Align the shelving unit and track lighting to the room's primary vanishing points.

staging.callout: Excellent industrial-chic styling with appropriate scale and cohesive decor.

architecture.callout: Ceiling fan blades are distorted; floor transition at entry is messy.

lighting.callout: Mirror reflection is hallucinated; lighting lacks directional depth from windows.

perspective.callout: Excellent alignment of furniture and rug with the room's vanishing points.

staging.callout: Cohesive farmhouse style; mirror is placed slightly too high on the wall.

architecture.callout: Walls, windows, and ceiling fan are perfectly preserved without any distortion.

lighting.callout: Soften the harsh black shadows under the sofa to match the bright ambient light.

perspective.callout: Adjust the sofa's contact point with the rug to eliminate the floating appearance.

staging.callout: Furniture selection and placement are aesthetically pleasing and scale-appropriate.

architecture.callout: Fix the asymmetrical ceiling fan blades and the warped tile transition at the door.

lighting.callout: Increase shadow density under the coffee table and ottoman to match the sofa.

perspective.callout: Furniture and rug are perfectly keyed to the room's perspective and floor plane.

staging.callout: Highly cohesive mid-century modern aesthetic with professional-grade scaling.

architecture.callout: Architectural lines and fixtures are perfectly preserved with zero distortion.

lighting.callout: Contact shadows under the sofa are a bit too heavy for the bright ambient light.

perspective.callout: Furniture is correctly grounded and follows the room's vanishing points.

staging.callout: Modern style is well-scaled and creates a cohesive, inviting atmosphere.

architecture.callout: Hallucinated door hardware and warped ceiling fan blades require correction.

lighting.callout: Natural light integration and soft shadow casting are exceptionally realistic.

perspective.callout: Furniture placement and rug orientation perfectly match the room's geometry.

staging.callout: Sophisticated boho styling with excellent texture layering and spatial awareness.

architecture.callout: Structural integrity is maintained with perfect alignment of walls and ceiling.

lighting.callout: Reduce the harsh, blown-out light splash on the wall behind the left lamp.

perspective.callout: Deepen contact shadows under the bed and bench to prevent a floating effect.

staging.callout: Coastal aesthetic is well-defined with appropriate furniture scale and textures.

architecture.callout: Flawless preservation of room structure and architectural details.

lighting.callout: Excellent balance between warm interior lamps and cool natural light.

perspective.callout: Fix: Adjust pet steps on ottoman to sit flush and match floor-level perspective.

staging.callout: Fix: Remove pet steps and crate to declutter and maintain a professional look.

architecture.callout: Room geometry and architectural details are flawlessly maintained.

lighting.callout: Natural and artificial light sources are balanced with high realism.

perspective.callout: Furniture is accurately scaled and grounded within the room's depth.

staging.callout: Distorted dog in crate and awkward scale of wall art on the right need correction.

architecture.callout: Structural lines are perfectly maintained with no warping in the ceiling or doors.

lighting.callout: Strong integration of ambient and lamp light, though shadows lack some depth.

perspective.callout: The pet steps on the floor and ottoman don't perfectly share the same vanishing point.

staging.callout: Remove pet-specific items and reduce the scale of the oversized leather ottoman.

architecture.callout: Flawless preservation of the tray ceiling, moldings, and door structures.

lighting.callout: Warm lamp glows and natural light from the door blend seamlessly with soft shadows.

perspective.callout: Bed and rug are perfectly anchored to the floor with correct vanishing points.

staging.callout: The black wall panels on the right are distracting and lack the quality of other items.

architecture.callout: Excellent preservation of tray ceiling and trim; clean transitions to adjacent rooms.

lighting.callout: Shadows under furniture lack depth; lamp glow on wall feels slightly artificial.

perspective.callout: Furniture alignment is strong, though dog crate angle feels slightly disconnected.

staging.callout: Pet crate and stairs clutter the shot; nightstands appear undersized for the bed.

architecture.callout: Excellent preservation of tray ceiling and wall lines; vent detail is slightly soft.

lighting.callout: Natural light from the right and warm lamp glows are perfectly balanced.

perspective.callout: Furniture alignment is strong, though pet stairs look slightly disconnected from floor.

staging.callout: Boho style is cohesive, but pet stairs and excess baskets create unnecessary clutter.

architecture.callout: Original structural lines are perfectly preserved with no warping or hallucinations.

lighting.callout: Convincing light interaction between the window and the interior light sources.

perspective.callout: Perfect furniture placement that respects the room's vanishing points and floor.

architecture.callout: Warped ceiling fan hub and unfinished outlet box detract from the professional finish.

perspective.callout: Flawless perspective; all items are perfectly anchored to the floor and wall planes.

staging.callout: Industrial-chic style is expertly executed with realistic textures and proper scaling.

architecture.callout: Structural lines are perfectly preserved; minor AI softening on the door handle.

lighting.callout: Natural and artificial light sources blend seamlessly with realistic shadow depth.

perspective.callout: Flawless furniture grounding; the rug and bed perfectly follow the floor plane.

architecture.callout: Walls, door, and window are perfectly preserved with no warping or hallucinations.

perspective.callout: Excellent placement; furniture sits naturally on the floor plane and follows lines.
